name: Short Pastry Crust
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Butter, unsalted, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt together into a large bowl.
2. Using two knives or a pastry blender, incorporate the butter and shortening into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add water to form a soft dough.
4. Form the dough into a ball, wrap it in wax paper, and chill for at least 1 hour.
